# `gds-aidr-infrastructure` Feature Request Template

<!--date_created:mon-18-may-2026-->
<!--date_updated:mon-18-may-2026-->


**Description**
Copy this document to suggest a new feature or requirement
Please use the boxes below to provide as much information required to help the team understand your request :)





**Example:**
```
name: Feature request for `gds-aidr-infrastructure`
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
environment: [dev]/[uat]/[prod]
title: "[feature: *[DESCRIPTION]*] "
labels: *[ADD LABELS]*
assignee: '@your-github-username'
name: firstname-surname
contact email: your-contact-email
```

---
## How to use this request template
<details>
<summary><b>1. Summary</b></summary>

```
One sentence: what do you want `gds-aidr-infrastructure` to do that it cannot do today?


```

</details>


<details>
<summary><b>2. Problem or motivation</b></summary>

```

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?
If this is related to a frustration with the current behaviour, describe it here.


```

</details>


<details>
<summary><b>3. Proposed solution</b></summary>

```Describe the feature as you imagine it. Include example API or CLI usage if you
have something in mind
```

```python
# Example of how you'd like to call it

```

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>4. Alternatives you have considered</b></summary>

```
 - Are there other approaches that could solve the same problem?
 - Why do you prefer the proposed solution?



```
</details>


<details>
<summary><b>5. Would you be willing to contribute this?</b></summary>




- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this.
- [ ] Maybe, with some guidance.
- [ ] No, just suggesting.

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>6. Additional context</b></summary>

```
*Links, screenshots, research papers, or any other relevant information.*


```

</details>



---
## Submissions

> Feature requests will be added to a record we keep internally and will be reviewed in the monthly AIDR change triage meeting


---
